hero_subtitle: SFTY Business connects KYC, KYB, and screening providers into unified onboarding workflows that generate comprehensive evidence packages for regulatory audit and operational review.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to compile consistent evidence packages across multiple KYC and KYB providers during onboarding. This fragmentation makes audit reviews slower and weakens traceability of critical customer and counterparty due diligence decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates provider outputs, case reviews, decision logs and regulatory data into unified onboarding evidence packages to help compliance teams build audit-ready, traceable due diligence records.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider checks through risk-based routing into structured onboarding cases with recorded decisions and preserved evidence packages.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB provider outputs into structured onboarding cases, preserving decision evidence and audit trails without replacing existing compliance tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs with secure orchestration, audit-ready onboarding packages and enterprise deployment for defensible bank due diligence and compliance governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected workflow to structure KYC, KYB, and onboarding data into reviewable cases, decisions, evidence and regulatory reports for digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates onboarding by connecting identity, corporate and sanctions providers into risk-based workflows with rules, case creation, decision logging and audit trails.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding case history, decision logs and supporting evidence, supporting full traceability for compliance reviews and regulatory audits.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC and KYB providers and connects their outputs into structured workflows without requiring provider replacement.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects and organizes their outputs into one controlled compliance layer with audit-ready evidence and reporting.
final_title: Prepare onboarding evidence packages with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects KYC, KYB and screening data into structured, audit-ready onboarding cases and evidence for compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
